name: Skip src in package files
summary: Including "src" in package.json "files" unnecessarily bloats tarballs when dist types and maps exist.
detail: Discovered mem-core was 7x larger than other packages due to including "src" in the "files" array. Since public types are in dist/*.d.ts and source maps are shipped, raw .ts files add no consumer value but significantly increase tarball size.
content: Discovered mem-core was 7x larger than other packages due to including "src" in the "files" array. Since public types are in dist/*.d.ts and source maps are shipped, raw .ts files add no consumer value but significantly increase tarball size.
